title: U-CHAMP: Urban Cardiovascular Health Assessment and Management Program
text:
Summary: High blood pressure, elevated blood glucose and high cholesterol are related to the increased risk of stroke and heart disease. Many studies have shown that this risk can be significantly reduced by lowering blood pressure, blood glucose and cholesterol levels.~Through a collaborative effort between Calgary Safeway pharmacists and Calgary Health Region family physician PCN's, U-CHAMP will deliver a program to assist in the identification and management of people with elevated blood pressure, blood glucose and cholesterol and through this effort, reduce the risk of heart disease and stroke in the urban Calgary population aged 18-85 years.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Adults 18-85 years 

 Signed consent 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 None
